chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1538 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 16.02.2026 Mr. Muhammad Shaharyar, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. ------------------------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant/accused, does not press the instant criminal bail application on the ground that the case is fixed for announcement of judgment before learned trial Court. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Gusher/PS
